mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ITEM_WISHLIST (USER_LOGIN_NO, ITEM_NO, CREATED_DT) VALUES (#{userLoginNo}, #{itemNo} , #{createdDt})
mapper.select: SELECT USER.USER_LOGIN_NO AS userLoginNo , ITEM.ITEM_NO AS itemNo , ITEM.ITEM_NAME AS itemName , ITW.CREATED_DT AS createdDt FROM ITEM_WISHLIST ITW JOIN USER_LOGIN USER ON USER.USER_LOGIN_NO = ITW.USER_LOGIN_NO JOIN ITEM ITEM ON ITEM.ITEM_NO = ITW.ITEM_NO WHERE ITW.USER_LOGIN_NO = #{userLoginNo} AND ITEM.DELETED_DT IS NULL ORDER BY ITW.CREATED_DT DESC
